def normalize_dataset(records):
    for rec in records:
        rec["name"] = rec["name"].strip().lower()

    for rec in records:
        rec["email"] = rec["email"].strip().lower()

    for rec in records:
        rec["phone"] = rec["phone"].replace("-", "").replace(" ", "")

    return records


def clean_prices(items):
    for item in items:
        item["price"] = round(float(item["price"]), 2)

    for item in items:
        item["tax"] = item["price"] * 0.1

    for item in items:
        item["total"] = item["price"] + item["tax"]

    return items
